problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
